name: Luscious Luau Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple well and reserve some juice as a substitute for up to 2/3 of the water.
2. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until combined.
3. Place the dough into a greased pan.
4. Select light crust, sweet bread setting on your oven.
5. Bake according to the desired texture.
